violations.text: The establishment back door, to outside, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026
Cracked fan cover located in the (W/I freezer) area was not in good repair. Fan covers shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026

The following areas have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris: -Floors underneath equipment throughout the establishment -W/I freezer floor mats and fan covers -W/I cooler fan covers The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
